summary:
The patient’s extensive supraglottic and glottic involvement indicates advanced stage cancer requiring definitive local control. Total laryngectomy is the appropriate initial therapy due to its proven efficacy in treating T3-T4 laryngeal carcinomas with significant anatomical spread.
